title: memspine — Repository & Feature Structure Plan (v1.5, consolidated)
summary: The authoritative buildable blueprint for memspine: repo tree, extras matrix, locked decision register (D-01…D-54), phase plan, and enhancement program.
notes: Master planning blueprint spanning many decisions, a repo tree, an extras matrix, and a phase plan rather than a single decision (not ADR) or a narrow API/schema contract (not SPEC). Contains a 'locked decision register' with strong ADR-like signals, but it aggregates/indexes decisions that live in individual ADRs rather than deciding one; the ADRs themselves are the locked sources. Competes SPEC vs DOC; classified DOC as an authoritative context/index document. Source hash derived deterministically from POSIX path (no SHA-256 compute tool available).
